address: 113 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10009, USA

sources_checked.limitation: Full, complete, current menu with sections and prices. Address confirmed on page (113 St Marks Pl, New York, NY 10009, East Village location). No allergen disclosures present. Beer & Wine / cocktail subcategories lack itemized flavors/brands.

notes: Only Crif Dogs' own hot dog/tots/burger/drink menu was extracted from the official crifdogs.com/menu page. PDT (the speakeasy hidden inside this same address via phone booth) is a separate concept with its own cocktail menu and was deliberately excluded — no PDT items appear on the crifdogs.com menu page anyway, so no PDT content was captured or needed exclusion in practice.
